ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To Apr-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michele McGill for Susanna Martinez and Hiram Marinas (Co-Administrators).

Ms. McGill stated that they were unable to do final distribution, that the Cordero Estate was waiting to inherit from the Marinas Estate, that they received distribution in January and that the accounting is pending. Ms. McGill also stated that the Co-Administrators are signing a supplemental inventory, that there are medical issue with the Co-Administrators and that she thinks they can have a petition for final distribution in 45-days. Status on close of estate is continued to April 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
